title: More Lore: Apple Pie
description: Add a sweet new treat to your game—apple pie!
body:
Add a sweet new treat to your game—apple pie! Yes, that's it. But this apple pie mod fits right in with the vanilla game.

**Crafting**: Craft an Apple Pie using an apple, sugar, and egg. Just like pumpkin pie!

**Trading**: Got emeralds? Trade with Apprentice Farmers to get some!

**Find it**: Explore Plains Village houses and check the chests—you might just find an Apple Pie waiting for you. Or maybe a feather. Who knows?

**Hero’s Gift**: Save a village from a raid, and you could get some pies as a thank-you gift from the grateful villagers.

This is the first mod in the Vanilla+ _More Lore_ series, where the goal is to add cool new features to Minecraft while keeping that classic vanilla vibe. I'm starting with small changes that make the game feel bigger and more alive. Stay tuned for more!


[My Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/Kr1s1s9302)
